thing-type.label: Cloud Connector Thing
thing-type.description: Cloud Connector Thing supporting captcha and 2FA authentication

parameter.name: username
parameter.label: Xiaomi Cloud Username
parameter.description: Xiaomi cloud username. Typically your email

parameter.name: country
parameter.label: Xiaomi Server Country
parameter.description: Xiaomi server country(s) (e.g. sg,de). Separate multiple servers with comma. Leave empty for all. See binding readme for country to server mapping

parameter.name: cloud-discovery-mode
parameter.label: Cloud Discovery Mode
parameter.description: Allow for discovery via the cloud. This may be used for devices that are not on the same network as openHAB server

parameter.name: user-id
parameter.label: Cloud User ID
parameter.description: Xiaomi cloud user ID, automatically retrieved at login

parameter.name: client-id
parameter.label: Cloud Client ID
parameter.description: Xiaomi cloud client ID identifies this client

parameter.name: service-token
parameter.label: Cloud Service Token
parameter.description: Xiaomi cloud service token, automatically retrieved at login

parameter.name: ssecurity
parameter.label: Cloud Ssecurity
parameter.description: Xiaomi ssecurity value, automatically retrieved at login

channel-type.label: Login/Captcha Image
channel-type.description: Scan QR code for login or Enter the captcha value in the captcha response channel.

channel-type.label: Captcha Response
channel-type.description: Enter in this channel the value as seen in the captcha.

channel-type.label: Two-Factor Response
channel-type.description: Enter the 2 factor authentication code received by email.

channel-type.label: Trigger Login
channel-type.description: Turn ON to cancel any in-progress login and start a fresh login sequence (new QR code or captcha). Resets automatically. Has a 30-second cooldown to prevent rapid re-triggering.
